features.featureTitle: When a new character is created, automatically grant them a starter equipment set consisting of at minimum one Weapon and one Armor piece. The starter weapon must provide enough base physical damage so that the character deals meaningful damage to level 1 monsters (well above 1 damage). The starter armor must provide enough base defense to meaningfully reduce incoming damage from level 1 monsters (which currently deal ~13 damage). Generate these items using the existing lootGenerator.ts item generation logic at item level 1 with Common rarity, then immediately equip them to the character's weapon and armor slots. This must happen at character creation time so the player never starts a dungeon run unequipped.

In DungeonSelectScreen.tsx, remove the non-functional drop rate percentage scroller/slider UI element. Replace it with a clean static informational display showing the current effective XP rate and drop rate for the selected monster level, calculated using the existing flat 6% base drop rate logic (6% base, reduced by 1% per level the monster is below the player's level, flooring at 0%). The display should be read-only text, matching the cleaner informational style used in prior versions of the screen.
